description: Negative: an email is drafted, the user briefly switches away, then returns and SENDS it. Completion signal observed — no loop at session end.

observations.screen_text: To: sarah@vendorco.com · Draft: Hi Sarah, confirming we'd like to renew at the current rate through 2027. Please send the paperwork.
VendorCo: current rate $4,200/yr, renewal window open
Message sent · Re: Contract renewal moved to Sent

must_not_detect: the Sarah email as a loop — it was sent (completion signal at observation 2)
the wiki lookup as a loop (it was evidence, and the parent task completed)
